response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in full-stack web and application development using JavaScript, TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, but entirely lacks the core hardware, SoC modeling, and deep learning workload optimization experience required for this Principal Performance Architect role.
strengths: Over 15 years of software engineering experience across various domains and tech stacks.
Demonstrated staff-level experience in software architecture and open-source development.
Background in low-latency applications and asynchronous I/O using DLang.
concerns: No experience with SoC and IP modeling or hardware-software co-design.
Lacks expertise in deep-learning workload optimization, SIMD/MIMD, and GPU architectures.
Experience is heavily skewed towards web, mobile, and high-level software rather than hardware infrastructure.
